ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nuclides" (
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nuclide */,
  "nuclide_name" TEXT /* Name of the nuclide */,
  "isotopic_mass" TEXT /* Isotopic mass of the nuclide */,
  "half_life" TEXT /* Half-life of the nuclide */,
  "mode_of_decay" TEXT /* Mode of decay for the nuclide */,
  "nuclear_spin" TEXT /* Nuclear spin of the nuclide */,
  "magnetic_moment" TEXT /* Magnetic moment of the nuclide */,
  "binding_energy" TEXT /* Binding energy of the nuclide */,
  "natural_abundance" TEXT /* Natural abundance of the nuclide */,
  "nuclide_symbol" TEXT /* Chemical symbol of the nuclide */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the nuclide */,
  "neutron_number" INTEGER /* Number of neutrons in the nuclide */,
  "isotopic_abundance" TEXT /* Isotopic abundance of the nuclide */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year the nuclide was discovered */,
  "discovery_team" TEXT /* Team or individuals who discovered the nuclide */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the nuclide is stable or radioactive */,
  "decay_energy" TEXT /* Energy released during decay */,
  "isotopic_composition" TEXT /* Isotopic composition in natural sources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuclide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclide_decay_modes" (
  "decay_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decay mode */,
  "decay_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the decay mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decay mode */,
  "parent_nuclide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent nuclide that decays */,
  "decay_energy" TEXT /* Energy released during the decay mode */,
  "decay_constant" TEXT /* Decay constant (λ) for the decay mode */,
  "half_life_uncertainty" TEXT /* Uncertainty in the half-life measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decay_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclide_decay_products" (
  "decay_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decay product */,
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nuclide decaying */,
  "product_nuclide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resulting nuclide */,
  "branching_ratio" TEXT /* Branching ratio of the decay */,
  "decay_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decay mode associated with the decay product */,
  "product_isotopic_mass" TEXT /* Isotopic mass of the decay product */,
  "product_isotopic_abundance" TEXT /* Isotopic abundance of the decay product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decay_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclide_decay_products_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclides ("nuclide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclide_decay_products_product_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclides ("nuclide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclide_decay_products_decay_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("decay_mode_id") REFERENCES nuclide_decay_modes ("decay_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclide_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nuclide being measured */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., half-life, binding energy) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement */,
  "uncertainty" TEXT /* Uncertainty of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., experiment, literature) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement (e.g., mass spectrometry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclide_measurements_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclides ("nuclide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nuclide being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the nuclide */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the nuclide data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclides ("nuclide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
